Wells Fargo — EDS Migration Inventory

Sitemap: 1,281 URLs English: 903 Spanish (Deferred): 356 Excluded: 22 Templates: 16
Showing all URL groups
Executive Summary

Site Analysis & Migration Scope

The Wells Fargo sitemap contains 1,281 URLs analyzed for Edge Delivery Services migration. Of these, 903 are English pages , while 356 are Spanish locale mirrors and 22 utility/test pages are excluded. The site architecture spans 16 page templates with a controlled gate strategy to validate parsers before bulk import.

Scope Split

70.5% English
English903
Deferred (Spanish)356
Excluded22

Import Gates

Largest Template Families

Executive Readout

The highest leverage work is template validation, not one-off page handling. The first two gates cover parser confidence and edge cases; Gate 3 then absorbs the remaining 793 production import pages.

Custom effort remains concentrated in reusable block patterns such as Disclaimers, help CTAs, product comparison, contact information, and calculator stubs.

The Wells Fargo sitemap comprises 1,281 URLs analyzed for migration to Adobe Edge Delivery Services. Of these, 903 are English pages, while 356 are Spanish-language locale mirrors and 22 utility/test pages are excluded.

The site architecture spans 16 page templates with a controlled gate strategy to validate parsers before bulk import.

repo In local repo
collection AEM collection / built-in
custom Custom — to be built

Phase Summary

PhasePagesDescription
English887English pages — full migration
Future356Spanish locale mirror — deferred
Excluded22Test, internal CMS fragments, utility pages
Stub16Calculator pages — link to live tools

Import Strategy

GatePagesDescription
Gate 1 (Representative)151 page per template — validate parsers & rendering
Gate 2 (Validation Batch)795-10 pages per template — catch edge cases
Gate 3 (Bulk Import)793Remaining pages — full production import

Block Inventory

All blocks required for the Wells Fargo EDS migration, organized by source tier. Blocks are sourced in strict reuse order — prefer existing solutions before building custom:

Default Content → Block Collection → Block Party → Custom

Block variations (per the 70% similarity rule) are added via the classes block-options pattern, not as new blocks.

21
Total Blocks
11
Block Collection
3
Block Party
7
Custom (to build)

Block Collection reuse & style to brand

Standard AEM Edge Delivery blocks available out of the box. These need brand styling but no structural development.

Block Content Model DA Table Structure Variations (classes) Used in Templates
Hero Standalone | Hero |
row 1: image · row 2: heading + CTA links
marquee compact biz cib wealth
 T1, T2, T3, T4, T8a, T8b, T9, T11, T14
Cards Collection | Cards |
rows: image | heading + body + link
icon icon-belt benefit article product icon-list insight 3-up 4-up
 T1–T5, T7–T11, T13, T14
Columns Configuration | Columns (n) |
n columns per row, free content per cell
image-text reverse centered bio-sidebar
 T4, T8a, T10–T14
Accordion Collection | Accordion |
rows: heading | rich-text body
compact numbered
 T2, T3, T4, T6, T11
Tabs Collection | Tabs |
rows: label | tab content
product-finder help-tabs scam-categories
 T1, T2, T6, T7
Table Collection | Table |
rows: standard table semantics
striped bordered fee
 T3, T8b, T12
Carousel Collection | Carousel |
rows: image | heading + body + link
promo insights
 T1, T9
Quote Standalone | Quote |
row 1: quote · row 2: attribution		 — T9, T10
Embed Auto-blocked URL on own line auto-blocks; or | Embed | with URL
video podcast
 T9, T10, T12
Fragment Auto-blocked Link to /fragments/* doc auto-blocks
app-promo fdic-bug cookie-consent leaving-site footer-disclosures investment-disclosures careers-promo
 All templates
Header / Footer Auto-blocked Authored at /nav, /biz/nav, /cib/nav, /investing-wealth/nav
default biz cib wealth
 All templates (via metadata)

Block Party community reuse — preferred over custom

Community-contributed blocks from aem.live/developer/block-party. Preferred over building custom when a match exists.

Block Content Model DA Table Structure Variations (classes) Used in Templates
Breadcrumb Auto-blocked Auto-generated from page path; suppressible via metadata — T3, T4, T5, T6, T7, T12
Callout / Alert Standalone | Callout |
row 1: icon · row 2: heading · row 3: body + link
alert info warn
 T3, T7
Modal / Interstitial Auto-blocked (per-link) External link with data-modal; modal body in fragment
leaving-site footnote spanish-not-available
 All templates

Custom Blocks build new — only where no BC/BP fit

Purpose-built blocks where no Block Collection or Block Party equivalent exists. Content models are richer than standard patterns.

Block Content Model DA Table Structure Variations (classes) Used in Templates
Disclaimers Auto-blocked Each row: col 1 = footnote number, col 2 = disclaimer rich-text. [1] refs become superscripts. — T1–T14 (every template)
help-cta Standalone (Fragment) | help-cta |
row 1: heading · row 2+: icon + label + link triplets ("Call us", "Find a location", etc.)
default product biz
 T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6
Sign-On Tile Configuration | Sign-On Tile |
rows: title | enroll-link | passkey-link | forgot-link | legal-link
cons biz vantage
 T1, T9
product-comparison Collection | product-comparison |
row 1: product columns · rows 2–N: attribute label | values per product
checking savings cards
 T2, T8b
App Promo Standalone | App Promo |
rows: image | heading + body + bullets | App Store link | Google Play link
compact side-by-side
 T1, T3, T4, T8a
contact-info Collection | contact-info |
row 1: heading · row 2+: dept name | phone | hours		 — T6, T12, T13
Help Sidebar Collection (Fragment) | Help Sidebar |
row 1: heading · rows 2–N: link		 — T5

Default Content Patterns no block needed

Standard semantic HTML rendered by Edge Delivery without a dedicated block. Styled via global styles.css — no JS decoration required.

Pattern Description Authoring Approach Used in Templates
Body copy Headings, paragraphs, lists, links within a section Standard rich-text authoring in document All templates
Inline images Images placed within body content flow Insert image in document; auto-optimized by EDS T5, T10, T12, T13
Section dividers Visual separation via --- (horizontal rule) Horizontal rule in document creates new section All templates
Button / CTA links Links styled as buttons via strong > a or em > a patterns Bold link = primary CTA, italic link = secondary CTA All templates

Block × Template Coverage

Quick reference showing which blocks appear in which templates. Shaded cells indicate the block is used in that template.

Block T1T2T3T4T5T6T7T8aT8bT9T10T11T12T13T14

Breadcrumb●●●●●●
Callout●●
Modal●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●
Disclaimers●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●
help-cta●●●●●●
Sign-On Tile●●
product-comparison●●
App Promo●●●●
contact-info●●●
Help Sidebar●
Block Collection AEM standard — style to brand
Block Party Community — adapt & integrate
Custom Build new
Default Content No block needed
Static Page Analysis

Static vs Dynamic Page Classification

Classification of all 1,281 URLs in the Wells Fargo sitemap by delivery model. Static pages can be fully migrated to EDS; Dynamic pages require API or personalisation wrappers; Mixed pages need partial EDS authoring with dynamic component overlays.

1,205 Static Pages 94.1% — fully EDS-ready, no wrapper needed
31 Mixed Pages 2.4% — static shell + dynamic component overlay
21 Dynamic Pages 1.6% — API-driven, require non-EDS rendering
24 Excluded Pages 1.9% — test, dev, CMS fragments, redirects

Delivery Model Distribution

94% Static
Static 1,205
Mixed 31
Dynamic 21
Excluded 24

Mortgage Journey — Development Plan (97 Static Pages)

End-to-end development plan for the Wells Fargo Mortgage line of business. 97 static pages under wellsfargo.com organized by customer funnel stage. Includes complete block inventory, third-party integration analysis, and weekly deliverables.

Scope: Only static content pages hosted on www.wellsfargo.com. Excluded from scope: calculators (JS/API), rate feeds, application forms, payment setup forms, and pages that are shells for secure app link-outs. These are handled as stub pages or CTA links to live tools.

Week 1
May 19 – May 23
22
pages imported
Setup + Template Validation
Week 2
May 26 – May 30
46
pages imported
Bulk Import Sprint
Week 3
Jun 2 – Jun 6
29
pages imported
Complete + Journey QA
Cumulative Progress97 pages total
W1: 22
W2: 46
W3: 29

Customer Funnel

Awareness
2
Consideration
34
Education
46
Manage
8
Support
7
User Journey Flow
/mortgage/ → /mortgage/loan-programs/* → /mortgage/learn/* → /mortgage/prequalification/ → /mortgage/apply/ → /mortgage/manage-account/

Team Assignments

DeveloperJourney StagePagesComplexityKey BlocksW1W2W3
Dev 1Awareness + Conversion (Entry & Exit Points)9HighHero (marquee), Cards (icon, 4-up), Tabs, Disclaimers, help-cta243
Dev 2Loan Programs & Home Buying17HighHero, Accordion, Cards, Table, product-comparison485
Dev 3Refinance, Equity & Personal Loans17MediumHero, Accordion, Cards, Table, Disclaimers485
Dev 4Education Articles (A–H)23LowDefault content, Cards, Help Sidebar, Disclaimers5117
Dev 5Education Articles (I–Z)23LowDefault content, Cards, Help Sidebar, Disclaimers5117
Dev 6Account Management + Support20MediumAccordion, Cards, Tabs, contact-info, Disclaimers5105
Dev 7Block Infrastructure + Design System + QAInfrastructureHighHero (2 variants), Cards (4 variants), Accordion, Columns, Table———

Block Inventory — OOB vs Custom

17
Total Blocks
10
OOB (style only)
7
Custom (build)
BlockSourceVariationsUsageCount
HeroOOBmarquee compactLanding pages5
CardsOOBicon product 3-up 4-upJourney steps, tools, features18
AccordionOOBcompact numberedFAQs, learn articles12
ColumnsOOBimage-text reverseCTAs, consultant contact15
TableOOBstriped feeRate tables, fee comparisons8
TabsOOBproduct-finderBuy vs. Refinance toggle3
CarouselOOBtestimonialCustomer testimonials2
QuoteOOB—Customer quotes4
EmbedOOBvideoEducational videos6
FragmentOOBapp-promo leaving-siteReusable content fragments10
DisclaimersCustom—Legal footnotes (every page)85
help-ctaCustommortgageConsultant contact section8
Rates TableCustommortgageDynamic rate display2
product-comparisonCustomloansLoan program comparison3
contact-infoCustom—Phone + hours + callback6
App PromoCustomcompactMobile app download4
Help SidebarCustom—Quick help links (articles)40

Template Inventory

Templates used in the Mortgage journey with page counts and key blocks. Each template represents a consistent page structure that shares parsers and transformers.

TemplatePagesFunnel StagesKey PagesKey Blocks
T2 L1 Product Landing3Awareness/mortgage/, /mortgage/rates/, /mortgage/learn/Hero, Cards, Tabs, Carousel, Quote, Disclaimers, help-cta, contact-info, Rates Table
T3 Product Detail49Consideration, Conversion, Management/mortgage/loan-programs/*, /mortgage/buying-a-house/*, /mortgage/apply/Hero, Accordion, Cards, Columns, Table, Disclaimers, help-cta, product-comparison, App Promo
T5 Education Article46Education/mortgage/learn/* (46 articles)Default content, Cards, Embed, Help Sidebar, Disclaimers
T6 Help/FAQ11Management, Support/mortgage/faqs/, /help/home-lending/, /mortgage/manage-account/payment-help/*Accordion, Cards, Tabs, contact-info, Disclaimers
TOTAL1094 templates covering the full mortgage funnel

Third-Party & System Integrations

Only static content pages under www.wellsfargo.com are in scope. The following 12 pages have been excluded because they require dynamic computation, forms, third-party APIs, or authenticated experiences:

12 Pages Excluded from Migration Scope
PageReasonAction
/mortgage/calculators/JS computation + API rate dataStub page with link to live tool
/mortgage/calculators/home-affordability-calculator/JS computation + API rate dataStub page with link to live tool
/mortgage/rates/Dynamic rate feed APIScheduled publish or API block (future)
/mortgage/prequalification/Shell for secure app link-outCTA links to web.secure.wellsfargo.com
/mortgage/personalized-rate/Shell for secure app link-outCTA links to secure rate tool
/mortgage/apply/Application form (secure app)CTA links to secure application
/mortgage/come-home/ComeHome third-party embedCTA links to ComeHome portal
/mortgage/welcome/Post-application (requires auth)Not migratable
/mortgage/cost-of-savings-index/Dynamic index calculatorStub page with link to live tool
/mortgage/manage-account/automatic-mortgage-payments/Payment setup formCTA links to authenticated experience
/mortgage/manage-account/payment-help/mortgage-assistance-application/Assistance application formCTA links to form
/mortgage/manage-account/wiring-instructions/Sensitive financial dataAuthenticated-only content

Remaining integrations below are handled as simple link-out CTAs within the 97 migratable pages — no custom development required.

IntegrationTypeImpactAction
Prequalification / Refinance ToolsInternal Secure AppLink-out onlyPreserve CTAs to web.secure.wellsfargo.com
Mortgage ApplicationInternal Secure AppLink-out onlyContent page with CTA to secure app
Consultant LocatorInternal ToolLink-out onlyCTA links to homeloans.wellsfargo.com/search/
ComeHome (Home Shopping)Third-PartyDecision neededRecommend: Link to portal (auth prevents embed)
Rate Feed APIAPIDecision neededRecommend: Scheduled publish via DA sheet (daily update)
Mortgage Calculators (4 pages)Dynamic JSNot migratableStub pages with description + link to live tools
OneTrust + Nuance ChatThird-Party (site-wide)delayed.jsLoad via delayed.js — no content impact
